title: Unique 52075EU Eco-Friendly Plates-23 cm-Construction Party-8 Count (Pack of 1), Paper, Multicolour
features: Paper plates measure approximately 23 cm in diameter
Ideal for serving food at a construction themed birthday party
Combine with other construction party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Get little builders ready for loads of fun by serving snacks on these Eco-Friendly Construction Party Plates. Featuring a bold and colourful dumper truck design, these paper plates are ideal for a construction birthday party or truck theme party. Perfect for serving your favourite party foods, these disposable plates will also make your after party clean-up really quick and convenient. As these plates are 100% plastic free, the great news is they are better for the environment too! Safety Warning No warning applicable
